log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hexblood — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Hexblood — Bardic Musician HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Hexblood — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Hexblood — Bardic Musician HP: 25/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hexblood — Bardic Musician --- HP: 25/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hexblood — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hexblood — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Hexblood — Bardic Musician HP: 11/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Hexblood — Bardic Musician HP: -11/67

--- Hexblood — Bardic Musician --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Hexblood — Bardic Musician --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
